title: Strange Fuels Mod
description: A practical and adventurous mod centered on "fuels".
body:
Strange Fuels Mod is a small adventure and practical mod, which integrates adventure and practicality.  
The mod is divided into three modules:  
1. Fuel module: 213 kinds of vanilla fuels are added, so that more items can be used as fuels to burn minerals and food.  
2. Recipe module: more practical recipes have been added.  
3. Adventure module: added 9 creatures, 4 dimensions, and a variety of minerals, food, tools, weapons, blocks, items, fuels, etc.  

For more information about the mod, please check the Chinese Wiki of the mod. (see the left side of the page)  
The mod is made by MCreator and it only supports Chinese for the time being.  
This mod has stopped updating since Nov 19, 2022.
